mainEntity.name: AEO deadlines for Chicago firm websites?
mainEntity.text: AEO deadlines for Chicago firm websites?

acceptedAnswer.text: No hard deadlines, but implement AEO before major updates like Google's AI rollouts; refresh quarterly for Chicago relevance.[1]

suggestedAnswer.text: Align with search algorithm changes (bi-annual). Chicago firms: Audit pre-holidays for injury queries. Delays cost leads in fast markets.[4]
